pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 1.8 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 8 standards, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring newer bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the javax.xml.bind API with the Jakarta EE equivalent (jakarta.xml.bind-api) to comply with Java 21 module system changes where javax packages are removed.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.xml.bind package was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and subsequent versions. Using the old groupId/artifactId may lead to missing class errors or conflicts if the project relies on Jakarta EE namespaces in Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the jaxws-rt dependency to provide JAX-WS implementation classes which are no longer included in the JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: JAX-WS APIs and implementations were removed from the JDK starting in Java 11. Without this dependency, any code using JAX-WS will fail at runtime with ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.general_idea: Replace deprecated Locale constructor with the new Locale.of factory method introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.why_exists: The Locale(String, String) constructor is deprecated for removal in Java 21, and relying on it may cause compile-time warnings treated as errors or runtime deprecation issues in strict environments.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/model/dto/Abst.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/model/dto/Abst.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID field in a Serializable class must be annotated with @Serial in Java 17+.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/model/dto/Pass.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 16+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/model/dto/Pass.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID field in a serializable class must be annotated with @Serial in Java 16+.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/model/dto/Role.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 16+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/model/dto/Role.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID field in a serializable class must be annotated with @Serial in Java 16+.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/model/request/.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 16+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/model/request/.why_exists: Compilation error: serialVersionUID must be annotated with @Serial in Java 16+ unless the class is not serializable or the annotation is suppressed.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/view/custom/mu.general_idea: Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/view/custom/mu.why_exists: String.formatted does not exist in Java 8, causing a compile error.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/view/custom/mu.general_idea: Replace Paths.get with Path.of introduced in Java 11.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/view/custom/mu.why_exists: Path.of does not exist in Java 8, causing a compile error.
